title: AgentContractReviewOutput
description: Output schema for the Senior Legal Contract Reviewer Agent v2.0 benchmark cases.

risk_level.description: Overall risk severity of the analyzed clause.

identified_vulnerability.description: Detailed explanation of the hidden legal or commercial trap.

calculation_logic.description: Logic for calculating EL, including judicial adjustment rules (e.g. 130% rule).

legal_citations.description: Specific laws or regulations cited as defense basis.

citation_verified.description: MUST BE TRUE if the citation was actively verified via RAG/Internet. FALSE if hallucinated or purely from LLM memory.

confidence_degrade.description: If citation_verified is false, explicitly state the memory-degradation warning.

defense_plan_b.description: The mandatory, unyielding replacement clause (Plan B) to protect the user's interests.
